nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 4am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 50, with temperatures rising to around 53 overnight. South wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.detailedForecast: Partly sunny, with a high near 73. South wind 10 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms

Mostly cloudy, with a low around 59. South wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
